overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious cyberpunk corporate lobby featuring dramatic red and cyan neon lighting, polished marble floors, and modern glass architecture. The footage transitions from a dimly lit reception area to a bright lounge with exterior views, showcasing high-end ray-traced game engine visuals.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit luxury lobby with polished marble floors and dramatic red neon lighting. The camera approaches a large illuminated reception desk while passing massive concrete pillars, with exterior city views visible through glass walls on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: main lobby hall transitioning to executive lounge

approaching the cyan-lit glass lounge area

segments.scene_description: Passing the reception desk, the camera moves through the main lobby hall where a holographic display floats above the counter. The red neon lights shift to the left rear as the camera approaches a glass-enclosed lounge area with distinctive cyan lighting visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: executive lounge with exterior courtyard views

events.description: entering the glass-enclosed lounge with cyan lighting
increasing natural daylight from large exterior windows

modern white leather lounge seating arranged in conversation areas
floor-to-ceiling windows revealing outdoor courtyard and buildings
decorative suspended light fixtures with golden elements
potted greenery in large planters near the glass walls

segments.scene_description: Entering the glass-enclosed executive lounge, the scene brightens with cyan neon overhead lighting and natural light streaming through massive exterior windows. Modern white sofas and indoor plants furnish the space as the camera approaches the windows overlooking an exterior courtyard with adjacent buildings visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit corporate lobby that gradually transitions into a bright, airy executive lounge. It begins by gliding across polished marble floors under dramatic red neon lighting, passing massive concrete pillars and a large illuminated reception desk. As the camera moves past the desk and a floating holographic display, the red glow recedes to the rear while the view opens toward a distant, cyan-lit glass enclosure. The scene then shifts into the executive lounge, where the lighting transforms from moody neon to a blend of bright cyan overheads and natural light streaming through massive windows. Finally, the camera drifts past modern white sofas and indoor plants toward the glass walls, revealing an exterior courtyard and adjacent city buildings.
